text: They now have an energy system. A new approach without having to go through as many ads for the free version.

Hello! Before I start this review, I want to make sure that Duo won't do anything bad to me because of what I have said. On that note, over the last few days, I have been having an issue where I complete my lesson, but it doesn't count it as having been completed. The thing is, my quests acknowledge that I have completed a lesson, but I don't gain any xp, and my streak doesn't go up. Anyway, that's all. Have a good time period of your 24 hour cycle.
It is good and fun but I would like to tell you that it would be better if we get to choose different number of days or streaks for each course.

This app used to be great for learning, but now it feels more focused on making money. The new “energy” system is frustrating — it decreases even when answers are correct, which makes no sense. The earlier heart system was much better. Also, it clearly shows that user data is shared with third parties, which is a serious privacy concern. This update has made the app annoying and less useful. Honestly, there are much better alternatives available.
